author: AGSCogs
description: Fetch random dad jokes on demand and schedule daily postings in a configured channel, with rotating pre-messages, timezone support, and full configuration commands.
end_user_data_statement: Stores only guild configuration (channel, schedule, prefixes); no personal user data is stored.
install_msg: Thank you for installing DailyDadJokes! Use `[p]dadjoke` to fetch a joke or configure daily posts with `[p]dadjoke enable` etc.
short: Dad jokes on demand and daily scheduling
